title: YOUEON 4 Pack Small Glass Bubble Bowl Vases, 15 cm Glass Terrarium Bowls Fish Bowls, Round Candle Holders, Globe Flower Vase Centerpiece for Wedding Event Home Decor
features: PLEASE CHECK THE SIZE CAREFULLY BEFORE PURCHASING

Small Size: YOUEON set of 4 glass bubble bowl measures 6"/15cm D x 4.5"/11.5cm H with a capacity of 47 Oz/1.4 L, open width 4"/10 cm, varies slightly due to handmade process. The small size will allow you to place some items and won't take up too much space on your table.

Spherical Shape: Simple but unique spherical shape fish bowl can match with most modern deocoration and make it a eye-catcher centerpiece to spice up your room. Ideal to use as small fish bowl, candle holder, small terrarium bowl, flower vase, candy dish and other centerpiece.

Multipurpose Glass Vase: Creative round glass bowl are handmade with high boron silicon heat resistant glass, clear and smooth. These round glass vases can be used to hold many items such as flowers, candles, floating candles, goldfish, seashells, plants, etc, just a little embellishment to create your own decorations.

Widely Application: Ideal for home or office decor, the elegant clear bubble bowl vase can be used for a variety of occasions such as weddings, baby showers, birthdays, celebrations, dinners and a variety of other events to create an eye-catching scene.
Ideal Gift: The clear terrarium is an ideal gift for family and friends who love flowers or plants and keep it at home for a touch of clean, modern style in their living space.
description: Product Description YOUEON 4 Pack 15 cm Clear Bubble Bowl Glass Vase Multipurpose Round Glass Vase The bubble bowl vase is ideal for presenting various decorative objects such as flowers, shrubs and branches in an impressive way - there are no limits to creativity! The glass vase creates a warm and modern atmosphere in your own four walls, but also makes an excellent gift idea. The spherical glass vase has a classic style and convinces with a clear, timeless look. With individual cut flowers, dried grasses or a bound bouquet, great accents can be set. But even without other elements, the glass vase adds charm to your home. The vases from YOUEON also create a dreamlike atmosphere. The spherical flower vase also cuts a great figure as a unique gift idea for birthdays, Christmas or weddings. Clear Bubble Bowl Glass Vase Spherical Shape Simple but unique spherical shape can be matched well with most household style and make it a practical eye-catcher to spice up your room. Versatile Uses The elegant flower vase is ideal for various plants, like ferns, succulents, air plants, cacti, or mini glass terrarium garden. It can also be used as candy dish, fruit plate, floral arrangement, planter terraium or even to place a candle to create special romantic atmosphere on special occasions. Handmade Glass Vase Handmade with high boron silicon heat resistant glass, which is sturdy and durable. Key Features Clear Bubble Bowl Glass Vase Home Centerpiece Fish Vase & Flower Vase & Candy Dish Glass Terrarium 4 Inch Open Mouth Set of 4 glass vase bowl measures diameter 6"/15.2 cm, height 4.5"/11.4 cm , open width 4"/10.2 cm, varies slightly due to handmade process. Thickened Glass Vase Handmade with thickened high boron silicon heat resistant glass. Multipurpose Vase Multipurpose vase can be used as terrarium, fish vase, flower vase, candy dish and more.
